umbrella_description: Healthy-brain surveillant microglia and early-transition states. Core: P2RY12, CX3CR1, TMEM119, CSF1R.

sub_subtypes.protein_surface_markers: P2RY12 (S), TMEM119 (S), CX3CR1 (S), CSF1R/CD115 (S), MERTK (S); SALL1 (I, nuclear TF)
sub_subtypes.context: Normal healthy brain; dominant in adult brain
sub_subtypes.references: Hammond et al. (2019), Immunity; Masuda et al. (2019), Nature; Galatro et al. (2017), Nat Neurosci; Paolicelli et al. (2022), Neuron (nomenclature)
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Refreshed to human HUGO symbols; added Paolicelli 2022 nomenclature reference and P2RY12/TMEM119/CSF1R as canonical surface markers.

sub_subtypes.context: Potential response to tau-bearing neurons; specialized homeostatic function
sub_subtypes.references: Martins-Ferreira et al. (2025), Nat Commun (HuMicA); Gerrits et al. (2021), Acta Neuropathol
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Refreshed to human symbols; flagged that GRID2/neuronal genes may reflect neuronal ambient RNA in snRNA-seq (per Marsh 2022 dissociation-artifact concerns).

sub_subtypes.context: Transition state between homeostasis and activation; response to subtle perturbations
sub_subtypes.references: Martins-Ferreira et al. (2025), Nat Commun (HuMicA); Marsh et al. (2022), Nat Neurosci
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Refreshed to human symbols; added CD83 surface marker and Marsh 2022 caveat (IEGs FOS/JUN/DUSP1 can be ex-vivo dissociation artifacts).

umbrella_description: A continuum of activated/disease-associated states (DAM/MGnD/ARM and human/disease-specific variants). They share TREM2/APOE/ITGAX/GPNMB and differ by sub-state-specific markers. NOT discrete clusters — a trajectory.

sub_subtypes.context: Alzheimer's disease, amyloid pathology, neurodegeneration, aging
sub_subtypes.references: Keren-Shaul et al. (2017), Cell; Krasemann et al. (2017), Immunity; Hammond et al. (2019), Immunity; Martins-Ferreira et al. (2025), Nat Commun (HuMicA); Sun et al. (2023), Cell
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Added MGnD (Krasemann 2017) and DAM-2 synonyms; added human DAM confirmation (Sun 2023 MG-AD state); enriched surface panel (TREM2/CD9/CD11c/CLEC7A).

sub_subtypes.references: Marschallinger et al. (2020), Nat Neurosci; Hammond et al. (2019), Immunity; Martins-Ferreira et al. (2025), Nat Commun (HuMicA)
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Merged with Marschallinger LDAM concept; added CD36/MSR1 scavenger-receptor surface markers and BODIPY/PLIN2 lipid-droplet detection; clarified aging/dysfunction context.

umbrella_description: Cytokine-releasing and monocyte-derived (DIM) cells. DIM is SALL1-neg/CCR2+ (monocyte origin), distinct from microglial DAM.

umbrella_description: Ribosome-biogenesis / translation-high microglia. Defined as two separate clusters in HuMicA (Ribo.DAM1, Ribo.DAM2), both mapping to Sun 2023's MG3 'Ribosome Biogenesis' state. HuMicA retained them after filtering nuclei with >5% ribosomal-RNA content, so they are not simply high-ribosomal contamination — but ribosomal/translation signatures can also reflect ambient RNA or low-QC nuclei (Marsh 2022). Interpret with caution: verify QC (mito %, ambient fraction, doublets) before annotating, and treat their biological role as not yet fully established.

sub_subtypes.upregulated_genes_human: SYT1, PCDH9, LSAMP, CADM2, CALM1, KCNIP4, PEBP1, RBFOX1, CNTNAP2, RPL39, DYNLL1, COXFA4, MT-ATP6, RPS27, DLG2, RTN3, MT-ND1, ATP5F1E, RPL18A, RPS18
sub_subtypes.upregulated_genes_denoised: SYT1, PCDH9, LSAMP, CADM2, CALM1, KCNIP4, PEBP1, RBFOX1, CNTNAP2, RPL39, DYNLL1, COXFA4, MT-ATP6, RPS27, DLG2, RTN3, MT-ND1, ATP5F1E, RPL18A, RPS18
sub_subtypes.protein_surface_markers: No specific validated surface marker (signature dominated by ribosomal/mito + neuronal ambient genes; likely low-quality/ambient cluster)
sub_subtypes.context: Ribosome-biogenesis / translation-high state (HuMicA cluster 3; Sun MG3). Headed by SYT1/PCDH9; found in neurodegenerative contexts. Possibly a distinct population, but ribosomal signatures also flag potential ambient-RNA / low-QC nuclei — confirm QC before use.
sub_subtypes.references: Martins-Ferreira et al. (2025), Nat Commun (HuMicA); Sun et al. (2023), Cell; Marsh et al. (2022), Nat Neurosci
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Reframed from 'artifact, exclude' to 'interpret with caution': HuMicA defines this as a distinct ribosomal cluster (Ribo.DAM1) retained after >5% ribosomal-RNA filtering and maps it to Sun 2023 MG3 (Ribosome Biogenesis), so it is not simply contamination; Marsh 2022 QC caveat retained.

sub_subtypes.upregulated_genes_human: PLEKHA7, MECOM, OOEP, ATP5F1E, FTH1, BAIAP2L1, PLEKHA6, BDNF-AS, FTL, NACA, SLC27A4, APOO, SLC47A1, ZNF90, TXNRD1, XPO5, RPL19, TMSB10, UBA52, TOMM7

sub_subtypes.protein_surface_markers: No specific validated surface marker (ferritin FTL/FTH1-high; iron handling); validate by ferritin IHC if used
sub_subtypes.context: Second ribosome-biogenesis / translation-high state (HuMicA cluster 5; Sun MG3) with a distinct signature including ferritin (FTL/FTH1). HuMicA speculates Ribo.DAM1 and Ribo.DAM2 may be two biologically distinct populations, but notes their role requires further investigation; confirm QC before use.
sub_subtypes.references: Martins-Ferreira et al. (2025), Nat Commun (HuMicA); Sun et al. (2023), Cell; Marsh et al. (2022), Nat Neurosci
sub_subtypes.changes_vs_baseline: Reframed from 'artifact, exclude' to 'interpret with caution': HuMicA reports Ribo.DAM2 as a separate cluster from Ribo.DAM1 (each with distinct traits, both mapping to Sun MG3) and explicitly speculates they are two biologically distinct populations 'requiring further investigation'; ferritin (FTL/FTH1) component noted; Marsh 2022 QC caveat retained.
